name: @ondewo/csi-client-nodejs
description: ONDEWO Communication System Integration (CSI) Client library for Nodejs
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.pretest: tsc src/auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts src/auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && tsc examples/listS2sPipelines.ts examples/listS2sPipelines.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build/examples
